BrainEnrich 2.0.0

    • Preparation of gene sets (annoData)

    • Simulation analysis (brainscore.simulate)
    • Computation on HPC with slurm

Find core genes influencing aggregated score or LM coefficients

find_core_genes.Rd

Leave-one-out analysis to identify genes with the largest influence on enrichment scores or standardized LM coefficients.

Usage

find_core_genes(
  geneList,
  geneSetList,
  pred_df = NULL,
  cov_df = NULL,
  aggre_method,
  n_cores = 1,
  threshold_type = c("sd", "percentile"),
  threshold_value = 1
)

Arguments

geneList

A matrix of genes by subs/models.

geneSetList

A named list of gene sets.

pred_df

Optional predictor data frame. If NULL with cov_df, group-level mode is used.

cov_df

Optional covariate data frame.

aggre_method

Aggregation method name or custom function.

n_cores

Number of cores.

threshold_type

Threshold method (sd or percentile).

threshold_value

Threshold value.

Value

A named list of character vectors with directional labels (driver/buffer). The label is assigned by comparing the sign of the leave-one-out change with the sign of the full statistic: driver means the gene reinforces the observed effect, while buffer means the gene attenuates or opposes it.

On this page
